Description.English:
The echo of a genetic possibility, forgotten by evolution. It twitches with a wild energy.

Extracted from a creature caught within a repeating circuit of time. Of great value to Specialist Polo as they research the loop.
Description.SimplifiedChinese:
一种潜在基因的回音，被进化所遗忘，内含一种野生能量。

从一个重复的时间循环内的生物中提取，对保罗专家的循环研究有极大价值。
Description.TraditionalChinese:
基因可能性的回音，被演化所遺忘。它以一股狂野能量抽動著。

從受困於重複時間迴圈的生物中萃取而出。對正在研究迴圈的專家波羅有莫大的價值。

PinObjectiveTip.English:
Ancestral Memories are echoes of genetic possibilities, forgotten by evolution.

Harvest Ancestral Memories from friendly creatures caught within the loop. Befriend creatures by feeding them Creature Pellets.
PinObjectiveTip.SimplifiedChinese:
先祖记忆是一种潜在基因的回音，被进化所遗忘。

从被循环捕获的友好生物中提取先祖记忆。给动物喂生物颗粒从而与它们变得亲近友好。
PinObjectiveTip.TraditionalChinese:
祖傳記憶為被演化所遺忘的基因可能性回音。

你可從受困於迴圈的友善生物上採收祖傳記憶。透過餵食生物顆粒飼料即可與生物交朋友。

PinObjectiveMessage.English: Harvest Ancestral Memories from friendly creatures caught within the loop
PinObjectiveMessage.SimplifiedChinese: 从陷入循环的友好生物身上采集先祖记忆
PinObjectiveMessage.TraditionalChinese: 從受困於迴圈的友善生物上採集祖傳記憶
